behavior_in_task_description.reason: Instruction names all required identifiers: Update-VerificationLabels, $LabelConfirmed, $LabelFailed, label strings 'ai-reproduction-confirmed'/'ai-reproduction-failed', $labelToAdd, $labelToRemove, $LASTEXITCODE, $foundPR, gh pr view, gh pr list --head, '## PR Labels' section, and the two file paths.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes required function name, variables, and API methods but doesn't provide full code implementation; agent must still write the toggle logic and REST calls.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests assert specific variable names ($labelToAdd, $labelToRemove, $foundPR) and exact label constants ($LabelConfirmed='ai-reproduction-confirmed', $LabelFailed='ai-reproduction-failed'), but gold solution uses 's/ai-reproduction-confirmed' prefix — tests use substring match ('ai-reproduction-confirmed' in c) so gold passes, but this still constrains naming heavily. However, the instruction itself mandates these exact names, so alternatives would violate the spec. Still, the test_update_labels_

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: All f2p tests are static text/regex inspection of PS1 and SKILL.md files (e.g., 'gh pr list' in content, '$foundPR' in content, '## PR Labels' in content). No test actually executes the PowerShell function or verifies runtime behavior.

test_not_tautological.reason: Tests require specific string tokens, counts (>=2 true/false calls), and structural elements that a stub can't satisfy without real edits.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Each behavior in instruction (function logic, constants, 4 path calls, PR fallback, SKILL.md section) maps to a test.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are grouped with section comments (Gates, Fail-to-pass, Pass-to-pass) and have descriptive names.

structured_data_schema.reason: Task does not produce structured data output.

no_typos.reason: Paths and variable names appear consistent between instruction and tests.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction identifies files to modify which is appropriate; does not cite specific line numbers.
